text.zh: Conditional GAN 是当前 legacy 展示中的一个 AI 历史节点。
text.en: Conditional GAN is an AI history milestone in the current legacy presentation.

text.zh: Conditional GAN 把类别标签或其他辅助信息同时加入生成器和判别器。这让对抗生成从无方向的数据分布采样变成可控制生成。
text.en: Conditional GAN added labels or other side information to both the generator and discriminator. This made adversarial generation controllable rather than only sampling from an undirected data distribution.
